data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Added design questions section to onboarding SKILL.md: (1) expanded area 6 design question guide with conditional activation for UI projects, covering vision/archetypes/golden paths/anti-patterns/visual language/accessibility; (2) added skip logic for CLI/library/infrastructure/non-UI projects; (3) added Step 2a to Phase 3 Completion for writing .claude/design-notes.md (UI projects only); (4) updated Quick Reference table to reference .claude/design-notes.md
